context: Split from PRD-001: the global lib/jquery.min.js in index.html is independent of the npm jquery package and is used only by course-content inline scripts ($('#x').load(url))
choice: Track global jQuery removal as its own deferred epic rather than expanding PRD-001
rationale: It is course-content work (not exercise rendering), spans ~9 course.yml files plus the test-course cosmology HTML, and carries content-regression risk that should not gate the Quasar conversion.
